summary: Tested both password-reset flows end-to-end: (A) Admin direct reset (auto-gen + manual, weak-pw rejection, mismatch rejection, login-with-new, old-pw-invalidation, must_change_password) and (B) Self-service reset (forgot-password unknown/valid, token validate, token consume, one-time reuse block, weak-pw on reset, login-with-new). Backend pytest: 13/13 passed. Frontend UI: /forgot-password + /reset-password public pages fully verified (valid/unknown user, masked email, invalid/missing token screens). Employees → Reset Credentials dialog opened, manual mode reset succeeded (success toast 'Credentials reset successfully' shown, dialog closed, password NOT displayed). Auto-gen UI path partially verified via screenshots of prior iteration (dialog structure + testids exist exactly as spec). Umesh.Gana password restored to pass123 via direct Mongo update (backend endpoint rejects <8 chars by design).
critical_code_review_comments: Both ResetPassword.js and Employees.js 'Reset Credentials Dialog' use the same data-testid="reset-submit-btn" — works because they render on different routes, but consider namespacing (e.g. admin-reset-submit-btn) to avoid future selector collisions.

Umesh.Gana account currently seeded with a 7-char password (pass123) while the reset endpoint enforces >=8 chars + letter+digit. The legacy short password bypasses the strength rule because it was stored pre-policy — if you ever re-seed via the admin reset endpoint it will 400. Document this divergence or relax seed path.
brute-force lockout kicks in quickly on /api/auth/login (observed 403 after a few intentional wrong-password attempts). Ensure lockout cooldown window is documented for test environments.
forgot-password returns 404 with 'User not found' — this is per the spec, but is a user-enumeration vector; consider a generic 200 response in production.
ForgotPassword.js imports useNavigate but uses it only for Back-to-login; minor dead-ish code OK.

success_rate.frontend: 100% on all verified flows (public reset pages + admin manual-mode reset dialog)

test_credentials: admin/pass123 (HR), Umesh.Gana/pass123 (restored via Mongo after tests)
seed_data_creation: None — used existing Umesh.Gana; password_reset_tokens rows created by tests are auto-invalidated (used=true) and have TTL on expires_at.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Auto-generated password UI flow (reset-mode-auto, Show/Hide, Copy, Done) was blocked from a second UI pass only because Umesh.Gana hit the login-lockout after repeated API login calls during this session. All reset-generated-pwd-box / generated-password-show-btn / generated-password-copy-btn / reset-generated-done-btn testids are present and structurally correct per code review of Employees.js lines 2160-2195. Backend auto-generate + must_change_password behavior is fully covered by pytest. If re-verifying UI auto-mode, either wait ~15min for lockout to clear or use a different employee id.
rca of the issue: N/A — no bugs found. Sole transient test friction was account lockout on Umesh.Gana during repeated login probes; mitigated by restoring password via Mongo at end of suite.
